about.paragraphOne: I'm Karol, a Full-Stack Web Developer from Poland with commercial experience in building websites, web applications, backend APIs and automation tools.
about.paragraphTwo: I work across frontend implementation, API design, relational databases, integrations, workflow automation and deployment. I focus on software that is clear to maintain, useful in practice and reliable after release.

stack.description: Interfaces, backend services, relational data, automation and deployment combined into one working product flow.
stack.label: stack
stack.title: What I bring together

projects.description: A selection of commercial, team-based and open-source work across full-stack systems, automation, AI tooling and deployment.

b2bDocumentPlatform.name: B2B Document Automation Platform
b2bDocumentPlatform.label: full-stack / document workflow
b2bDocumentPlatform.description: A full-stack platform for generating, distributing and electronically signing legal documents. The system integrates Google Workspace API, uses Row-Level Security in PostgreSQL and is deployed on Linux with Docker and Caddy.

autoLektor.name: AI Voiceover & Subtitle Generator
autoLektor.label: python / AI automation
autoLektor.description: A Python automation tool that generates voiceover audio and subtitles from text. It combines Edge TTS with OpenAI Whisper to map timestamps and prepare reusable audio and subtitle packages for video post-production workflows.

restaurantManagement.name: Restaurant Management Application
restaurantManagement.label: full-stack / team project
restaurantManagement.description: A restaurant management application developed in a five-person team. The project uses tRPC and Prisma for end-to-end type safety, Vue 3 and Tailwind CSS for the interface, and JWT-based authentication.

localAgenticCli.name: Local Agentic CLI
localAgenticCli.label: open source / local AI tooling
localAgenticCli.detail: public open-source project / work in progress
localAgenticCli.description: An experimental TypeScript CLI for working with local AI models through Ollama. It includes an Ink-based terminal interface, streamed responses, persistent JSONL sessions, session recovery and an initial model-executed read_file tool.

projects.repoDescription: Public repositories are linked where available. Commercial work is clearly marked as private.

frontend.title: Frontend Engineering
